data.title: Legal & General Asset Management Adopts Blockchain for Money Market Funds
data.description:
Legal & General Asset Management (LGAM) is transitioning its longstanding money market funds to blockchain technology to enhance accessibility and expedite settlement processes. According to CoinDesk, this move marks a significant shift in how traditional financial instruments are managed, leveraging blockchain's capabilities to streamline operations and improve efficiency.

The integration of blockchain technology into LGAM's money market funds aims to provide a more transparent and efficient framework for transactions. By adopting blockchain, LGAM seeks to offer investors quicker settlement times and broaden access to these financial products. This development reflects a growing trend among financial institutions to incorporate blockchain solutions to modernize their operations and meet the evolving demands of the market. The decision underscores the potential of blockchain to transform traditional financial systems, offering a glimpse into the future of asset management.

data.title: CFTC Chairman Pledges to Combat Fraud and Insider Trading
data.description: CFTC Chairman Michael Selig has committed to intensifying efforts against fraud and insider trading. According to NS3.AI, Selig made this pledge in a written statement submitted to Congress, emphasizing the importance of maintaining market integrity and protecting investors. The statement outlines the CFTC's strategy to enhance surveillance and enforcement actions to deter illicit activities in the financial markets. Selig's commitment reflects a broader regulatory push to ensure transparency and fairness in trading practices.

data.title: Alibaba Reduces Free Tier for Qwen Code, Introduces New Subscription Plan
data.description: Alibaba has announced the termination of the free tier for its Qwen Code service, significantly reducing the daily free request quota from 1,000 to 100. According to NS3.AI, users are now encouraged to transition to alternative platforms such as Alibaba Cloud Coding Plan, OpenRouter, Fireworks AI, or utilize their own API keys. The new Coding Plan Pro subscription is priced at $50 per month. This adjustment follows closely on the heels of MiniMax's recent implementation of written authorization requirements for the commercial use of its M2.7 model, which took effect 48 hours prior.

data.title: Bank of England Governor Highlights Slow Progress on International Stablecoin Standards
data.description: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey has expressed concerns over the slow progress in establishing international standards for stablecoins over the past year. According to NS3.AI, Bailey emphasized the necessity for common cross-border regulations to ensure 'assured value,' which refers to the confidence that stablecoins can be redeemed at their face value. His remarks come as both Britain and the United States continue to advance their domestic regulations for stablecoins.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Mester Comments on Inflation Trends
data.description: Federal Reserve official Mester has indicated that the diminishing impact of tariffs will aid in reducing inflation. According to ChainCatcher, Mester also noted that housing inflation is moving in the right direction.

data.title: Fed's Mussa: Oil Price Shock Likely Driving Core Inflation Upward
data.description: Federal Reserve official Mussa has indicated that the recent surge in oil prices may be contributing to an increase in core inflation. According to Jin10, Mussa expects core inflation to approach 3% by the end of the year. This assessment comes amid ongoing concerns about the impact of energy costs on broader economic indicators. The Federal Reserve continues to monitor these developments closely as they evaluate potential policy responses.

data.title: USDT Issuer Accumulates Over $7.1 Billion in Bitcoin
data.description:
The issuer of the USDT stablecoin has amassed more than $7.1 billion in bitcoin, reflecting its strategic decision to reinvest up to 15% of its profits into the cryptocurrency. According to CoinDesk, this move is part of a broader effort to diversify its reserves and strengthen its financial position. The accumulation of bitcoin by the USDT issuer highlights the growing trend among stablecoin providers to hold significant amounts of digital assets as part of their reserve management strategies.

This strategy not only aims to enhance the issuer's financial stability but also aligns with the increasing adoption of cryptocurrencies in global financial markets. By allocating a portion of its profits to bitcoin, the USDT issuer is positioning itself to benefit from potential future appreciation in the value of the cryptocurrency. This approach underscores the issuer's confidence in bitcoin's long-term prospects and its role as a store of value. The decision to invest in bitcoin is indicative of a broader shift in the financial landscape, where digital assets are becoming an integral part of investment portfolios.

data.title: Fed's Mussa: Unemployment Rate May Slightly Increase as Economic Growth Slows
data.description: Federal Reserve official Mussa has indicated that as economic growth decelerates, the unemployment rate might experience a slight increase. According to Jin10, Mussa suggested that the rise in unemployment could be limited to just a few tenths of a percentage point. This statement comes amid concerns about the broader implications of slowing economic momentum on the labor market. The Fed continues to monitor these developments closely to assess their impact on future monetary policy decisions.

data.title: Rigetti Computing Shares Surge Over 11% Following Nvidia's Quantum AI Model Launch
data.description: Rigetti Computing's stock experienced a significant increase of over 11% on Wednesday. According to NS3.AI, this surge followed Nvidia's announcement of new open-source quantum AI models. Nvidia stated that these models aim to assist researchers and businesses in developing quantum processors for practical applications. Additionally, Rigetti emphasized its 108-qubit Cepheus-1-108Q system and highlighted its significant government contracts.

data.title: Swiss Central Bank Governor Highlights Inflation Uncertainty Amid Middle East Conflict
data.description:
Swiss Central Bank Governor Schlegel stated on Wednesday that the uncertainty surrounding Switzerland's inflation outlook is 'quite high,' emphasizing the need to closely monitor the impact of the Middle East conflict on potential second-round inflation effects. According to Jin10, Schlegel noted that the rise in energy costs due to the Middle East conflict likely represents a supply shock. 'However, it is crucial to closely observe second-round effects. If signs of such effects and excessive inflation emerge, central banks should act promptly and decisively,' Schlegel remarked.

Schlegel reviewed the Swiss National Bank's latest monetary policy decision from March, when the bank maintained its benchmark interest rate at zero while slightly raising this year's inflation forecast to 0.5%. He also pointed out that the Swiss National Bank's latest projections indicate that inflation will remain within the 0% to 2% target range until 2028. 'Clearly, the uncertainty surrounding this inflation forecast is quite high at present. Therefore, given the Middle East conflict, our willingness to intervene in the foreign exchange market has increased,' Schlegel stated.

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: Ethereum's price fluctuations are poised to impact liquidation levels significantly. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum's price falls below $2,233, the cumulative liquidation intensity for long positions across major centralized exchanges could reach $1.057 billion. Conversely, if Ethereum surpasses $2,450, the cumulative liquidation intensity for short positions could amount to $720 million.

data.title: Hyperliquid's Open Interest Hits Record $2.38 Billion
data.description: Open interest on Hyperliquid's HIP-3 markets reached a record $2.38 billion last week. According to NS3.AI, tokenized equity and commodity futures constitute seven of Hyperliquid's top 10 markets by volume.

data.title: Federal Reserve Reports Modest Economic Growth Amid Rising Energy Costs
data.description: U.S. economic activity has shown slight-to-modest growth across most regions, according to the Federal Reserve. Bloomberg posted on X that the ongoing conflict with Iran has introduced new uncertainties and contributed to increased energy costs. The Federal Reserve's assessment highlights the challenges faced by the economy in navigating geopolitical tensions and fluctuating energy prices. Despite these hurdles, the overall economic activity remains on a growth trajectory, albeit at a modest pace.

data.title: Aave Labs Introduces AI-Powered Governance Security System
data.description: Aave Labs has launched Aave Checkpoint, an AI-driven governance security system, on April 15. According to NS3.AI, this system is designed to enhance the review process for proposals and payloads by integrating automated analysis with required human verification prior to onchain execution. Aave Labs emphasized that Checkpoint complements Certora's manual proposal reviews and does not substitute existing security protocols.

data.title: Trump Administration Seeks to Reinstate Funding Freeze for Harvard University
data.description: The Trump administration has called on a federal appeals court to reinstate a freeze on $2 billion in research funding for Harvard University. Bloomberg posted on X, the move comes in response to the Ivy League institution's refusal to meet government demands concerning its governance practices. The administration's appeal highlights ongoing tensions between the government and the university over compliance issues.

data.title: ASML Shares Decline Over 5% Following New Export Restrictions on China Segment
data.description: ASML shares experienced a decline of over 5% on Wednesday due to new export restrictions affecting its China segment. According to NS3.AI, the company reported a reduction in the China segment's contribution to net system sales. Despite this setback, ASML has increased its 2026 net sales forecast to a range of $42.46 billion to $47.18 billion, up from the previous estimate of $40.12 billion to $46.02 billion.

data.title: Starbucks Launches Beta App in ChatGPT for Drink Recommendations
data.description: Starbucks has introduced a beta application within ChatGPT, allowing users to receive drink recommendations based on mood descriptions or uploaded photos. According to NS3.AI, the app enables users to browse drinks, customize orders, and select pickup locations directly within the chat interface. However, purchases must be finalized through the Starbucks app or website.

data.title: Sentinel Action Fund Endorses Jon Husted in Ohio Senate Race with $8 Million Commitment
data.description:
Sentinel Action Fund has announced its endorsement of Republican Jon Husted in the upcoming Ohio Senate race. According to NS3.AI, the fund, along with its sister group Right Vote, plans to allocate over $8 million towards supporting Husted's campaign. Despite this commitment, recent FEC filings as of Tuesday indicate no disbursements for Husted in 2026. However, the PAC has reported raising approximately $9 million from January 2025 through March 2026, with contributions from entities such as Solana Policy Institute and Multicoin Capital.

The article also highlights developments in Ohio's governor race, where Vivek Ramaswamy has advocated for a strategic Bitcoin reserve and revealed a 10% stake in Strive.

data.title: Legal & General Asset Management Offers £50 Billion in Tokenized Liquidity Funds
data.description: Legal & General Asset Management has introduced over £50 billion in liquidity funds in a tokenized format via Calastone’s blockchain-based distribution network. According to NS3.AI, this initiative allows authorized users to buy, hold, and transfer fund shares within a regulated framework. The traditional share classes will still be accessible through existing channels. Initially, the tokenized versions will be issued on Ethereum and other EVM-compatible networks.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Optimistic About Gasoline Price Decline During Summer
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent expressed optimism regarding a potential decrease in gasoline prices during the critical summer driving season. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Bessent's positive outlook amid ongoing concerns about fuel costs. The Treasury Secretary's remarks come as consumers and businesses alike are closely monitoring energy prices, which have significant implications for the broader economy. Bessent's comments suggest a hopeful outlook for relief at the pump, which could provide economic benefits during the high-demand summer months.
